evals.prompt: This CSS animates width and height transitions. Is there a performance issue?
evals.expected_output: Identify that width/height trigger layout (expensive), recommend animating transform/opacity instead for GPU compositing.

evals.prompt: I added will-change: transform to 50 elements on the page. Is this okay?
evals.expected_output: Flag that 50 simultaneous will-change layers waste GPU memory and may cause compositing jank, especially on mobile. Suggest applying dynamically only when needed.

evals.prompt: How can I improve scroll performance for a long list of items?
evals.expected_output: Recommend content-visibility: auto for off-screen items and CSS containment to isolate sub-trees from layout/paint.
